title: domain.EventFilter matcher (multi-flag AND, CSV value OR)
acceptance_criteria: Matches event, actor, id, from, to, op_id with AND between flags and OR within CSV values.
--id RKN-E01 matches descendants RKN-E01-S03 and RKN-E01-S03-T02.
Table-driven tests cover every field plus the prefix-id case.
